message:
fix: wire per-bead respawn circuit breaker into gt sling (clown show #22)

The witness spawn_count.go had shouldBlockRespawn/recordBeadRespawn but
no CLI code ever called them - dead code. The witness-deacon-sling loop
bypassed the Go-level circuit breaker entirely, creating 168 polecats
for two issues.

Changes:
- Export ShouldBlockRespawn/RecordBeadRespawn/DefaultMaxBeadRespawns
- Add ResetBeadRespawnCount for manual override
- Wire per-bead respawn guard into SpawnPolecatForSling (blocks after 3 attempts)
- Add per-rig directory cap (30 polecat dirs) as belt-and-suspenders
- Add gt sling respawn-reset subcommand

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
